title: Noindex Audit — 205 Pages With Noindex Tag

geo_pages.reason: No local data — 99 cities × 6 calcs, only 3 have GSC impressions (loan/nashville-tn, loan/reno-nv, tax/philadelphia-pa)

formula_tool_variants.reason: Formula-based variants (pct+yr, pct+mo patterns) — thin duplicate content, canonical to parent
formula_tool_variants.decision: KEEP_NOINDEX — intentional, but verify no internal links promote them

thin_scenarios.reason: Hash-ID scenarios pruned in V2 — no unique value, noindexed

verification_needed.sitemap_check: Verify NO noindex pages appear in any sitemap
verification_needed.internal_link_check: Verify indexed pages don't heavily link to noindex pages (wasting link equity)
verification_needed.count_accuracy: 205 + 591(geo) + 386(tools) + 2059(scenarios) > 205 — some overlap or count mismatch in GSC UI

action.immediate: Verify sitemap has zero noindex URLs
action.short_term: Reduce internal links from indexed pages to noindex pages
action.blocked: DO NOT change noindex to index without Qasem approval
